summary: Replayed ADR 0291 from the released 0.177.111 exact-main tip on top of the current 0.130.73 mainline platform baseline, recovered Docker bridge-chain drift on docker-runtime-lv3, revalidated the smoke-user notebook contract end to end, verified the public notebooks.example.com and Keycloak OIDC path, and finalized the JupyterHub integration on main without an additional platform-version bump because the notebook capability was already live before this synchronized replay.

verification.observed: The released exact-tip tree reran `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest -q tests/test_generate_platform_vars.py tests/test_ollama_runtime_role.py tests/test_openbao_compose_env_helper.py tests/test_keycloak_runtime_role.py tests/test_jupyterhub_runtime_role.py tests/test_jupyterhub_playbook.py tests/test_edge_publication_makefile.py tests/test_nginx_edge_publication_role.py`, plus `make syntax-check-jupyterhub`, `make syntax-check-ollama`, and `python3 scripts/validate_service_completeness.py --service jupyterhub`; the pytest slice returned `87 passed in 4.22s` and the full transcript is preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0291-mainline-targeted-checks-r5.txt`.

`ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=jupyterhub env=production` succeeded from committed source `89639b54194fcdd8713a4676bb53d961475afb91` with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=281 changed=5 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=82 rescued=0 ignored=0`, `localhost : ok=24 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=7 rescued=0 ignored=0`, and `nginx-lv3 : ok=46 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=7 rescued=0 ignored=0`; the replay recovered missing Docker bridge chains before force-recreating the JupyterHub runtime stack and is preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0291-mainline-live-apply-r11.txt`.

Fresh controller probes confirmed the public health endpoint, the Keycloak OIDC redirect with `client_id=jupyterhub`, the shared edge certificate SAN set including `DNS:notebooks.example.com` and `DNS:flags.example.com`, and the local `docker-runtime-lv3` dependency probes for `http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/version`, `http://127.0.0.1:8010/healthz`, and `http://127.0.0.1:8097/hub/health`; the transcript is preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0291-mainline-direct-verification-r5.txt`.

The released post-replay tree passed `make check-build-server`, `make validate`, `make remote-validate`, `make pre-push-gate`, `python3 scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, and `git diff --check`; `make validate` first exposed duplicate `directus_*` idempotency entries after the rebase plus stale generated SLO and subdomain-exposure assets, and the final pre-push rerun additionally required `python3 scripts/platform_manifest.py --write` after the remote builder flagged `build/platform-manifest.json` as stale. The clean transcripts are preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0291-mainline-check-build-server-r4.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0291-mainline-validate-r16.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0291-mainline-remote-validate-r6.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0291-mainline-platform-manifest-write-r2.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0291-mainline-pre-push-gate-r6.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0291-mainline-live-apply-receipts-validate-r7.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0291-mainline-git-diff-check-r7.txt`.

notes: This receipt is the canonical exact-main proof for ADR 0291 on top of repository release 0.177.111 and the current mainline platform baseline 0.130.73.

No additional platform-version bump is recorded here because JupyterHub first became true during the earlier branch-local proof on platform version 0.130.71; the synchronized mainline replay verifies that already-live capability on the newer 0.130.73 baseline.

The post-release gate sweep surfaced duplicate Directus idempotency entries plus stale generated SLO and subdomain-exposure assets after the rebase, and the final pre-push rerun required a refreshed `build/platform-manifest.json`; those branch-local repairs are included in the evidence trail alongside the final clean validation pass.
The earlier branch-local receipt remains part of the audit trail, while this exact-main receipt becomes the canonical `jupyterhub` entry for integrated repo truth.
